records.ety: [L. generatus, p. p. of generare to generate, fr. genus. See Genus, Gender.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Generated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Generating.]

defs: To beget; to procreate; to propagate; to produce (a being similar to the parent); to engender; as, every animal generates its own species.
To cause to be; to bring into life.
To originate, especially by a vital or chemical process; to produce; to cause.
quotes: Whatever generates a quantity of good chyle must likewise generate milk.

defs: To trace out, as a line, figure, or solid, by the motion of a point or a magnitude of inferior order.
